query:
SELECT 
  id,
  trainerId,
  clientId,
  sessionType,
  sessionDate,
  startTime,
  endTime,
  cancelled,
  cancelledAt,
  lastReminderSentAt,
  notes,
  createdAt,
  updatedAt
FROM training_sessions
WHERE id = 600035;
